                                                                                                              A Additional Method Details and Optimizer Prompts

                                                                                                              A 额外的方法细节与优化器提示

                                                                                                              This appendix gives the executable details behind SKILLOPT. The optimization loop keeps the task-execution model fixed and trains only a text skill document. A separate optimizer model reads rollout evidence, proposes patch-style edits, merges and ranks the edits, and submits each candidate skill to a held-out selection gate. The task-execution model only receives the current skill and the benchmark task; it does not see the optimizer prompts below. 本附录提供了 SKILLOPT 的可执行细节。优化循环保持任务执行模型不变，只训练一个文本技能文档。独立的优化器模型会读取回合证据，提出类似补丁的编辑，合并并对编辑进行排序，然后将每个候选技能提交给一个用于选择的隔离门。任务执行模型只接收当前技能和基准任务；它不会看到下面的优化器提示。

                                                                                                              B Limitations

                                                                                                              B 局限性

                                                                                                              SKILLOPT studies skill optimization as a lightweight alternative to model-weight adaptation, but it still has several practical limitations. First, the optimization loop relies on scored trajectories and a held-out selection split, so it is most directly applicable when the target task has automatic verifiers, exact-match metrics, executable checks, or otherwise reliable feedback signals. For open-ended domains where success is subjective, multi-dimensional, or costly to judge, the validation gate may require stronger human or model-based evaluation. Second, although the deployed artifact is only a compact best_skill.md, training the skill requires additional rollout computation and calls to an optimizer model; this cost is amortized when the same skill is reused, but may be less attractive for one-off tasks. Third, SKILLOPT intentionally optimizes a single portable skill rather than growing a large skill library or changing model weights. This design improves deployment simplicity, but a single skill may be insufficient for highly heterogeneous domains that require many disjoint procedures. Finally, optimized skills can encode domain-specific heuristics from the training distribution, so careful held-out evaluation remains necessary before transferring them to substantially different models, harnesses, or task settings. SKILLOPT 将技能优化研究为对模型权重适配的轻量替代方案，但仍存在若干实际局限。首先，优化循环依赖带评分的轨迹和一个保留的选择划分，因此在目标任务具备自动验证器、精确匹配指标、可执行性检查，或其他可靠的反馈信号时，最直接适用。对于成功主观、多维或难以评估的开放式领域，验证门可能需要更强的人类或基于模型的评估。其次，尽管部署产物仅是一份紧凑的 best_skill.md，但训练该技能还需要额外的回合计算，并调用优化器模型；当重复使用同一技能时，这部分成本会被摊销，但对于一次性任务可能吸引力较低。第三，SKILLOPT 有意优化的是单个可移植技能，而不是扩展大型技能库或更改模型权重。该设计提升了部署的简洁性，但对于需要许多彼此独立流程的高度异构领域，单一技能可能不够。最后，优化后的技能可能会从训练分布中编码领域特定的启发式规则，因此在将其迁移到显著不同的模型、工具箱或任务设定之前，仍需要谨慎的保留集评估。

                                                                                                              C Experimental Protocol Details

                                                                                                              C 实验协议详情

                                                                                                              Benchmarks and metrics. We use each benchmark's native evaluator and report hard success or exact-match accuracy on held-out test examples. SearchQA measures extractive question answering; SpreadsheetBench evaluates spreadsheet-oriented code and tool use; OfficeQA and DocVQA test local-document and multimodal-document reasoning; SealQA stresses noisy retrieval; LiveMathematicianBench evaluates mathematical multiple-choice reasoning; and ALFWorld tests sequential decision making. Dataset-backed benchmarks use deterministic train/selection/test splits, with a default 2:1:7 split when no benchmark-specific split is stated. The selection split is used only for model selection over candidate skills; all headline scores are computed on held-out test data. 基准与指标。我们使用各基准自带的评测器，并在留出的测试样例上报告硬性成功率或完全匹配准确率。SearchQA衡量抽取式问答；SpreadsheetBench评估面向电子表格的代码与工具使用；OfficeQA和DocVQA测试本地文档与多模态文档推理；SealQA强调噪声检索；LiveMathematicianBench评估数学多项选择推理；ALFWorld测试顺序决策。带数据集支持的基准使用确定性的训练/选择/测试划分；若未说明基准特定划分，则默认采用2:1:7划分。选择集仅用于在候选技能中进行模型选择；所有主结果分数都基于留出的测试数据计算。

                                                                                                              Baselines. The no-skill baseline evaluates the frozen student without an optimized skill document. Human-skill and LLM-skill baselines use manually written and one-shot generated skills under the same evaluation protocol. Trace2Skill mines skill artifacts from training trajectories and evaluates the frozen student without SKILLOPT's iterative validation gate. TextGrad and GEPA are reflective prompt-optimization baselines for direct-chat settings. EvoSkill is included for the harness-backed comparison where a matched completed run is available. Entries not measured under the final aligned protocol are marked as -rather than mixed with incompatible runs. 基线。无技能基线在未优化技能文档的情况下评估冻结的学生模型。Human-skill和LLM-skill基线在相同评测协议下使用人工编写和一次生成的技能。Trace2Skill从训练轨迹中挖掘技能产物，并在不使用SKILLOPT迭代验证门控的情况下评估冻结的学生模型。TextGrad和GEPA是用于直接对话设置的反思式提示优化基线。EvoSkill包含在有匹配完成运行可用的harness支持比较中。未在最终对齐协议下测得的条目标记为-，而非与不兼容的运行混在一起。

                                                                                                              Optimization protocol. Unless otherwise stated, SKILLOPT runs for four epochs with rollout batch size 40, reflection minibatch size 8, textual learning rate 4, cosine learning-rate decay with minimum rate 2, held-out validation gating, slow update enabled with 20 sampled examples, and optimizer-side meta skill enabled. The optimizer analyzes successes and failures separately, proposes patch-style skill edits, merges duplicate or contradictory proposals, ranks edits under the current learning-rate cap, and applies the selected edits to form a candidate skill. The candidate is evaluated on the selection split and is accepted only if it improves the current selection score; the best accepted skill is exported as best_skill.md. The student model, backend, harness, and benchmark evaluator remain fixed during optimization. 优化协议。除非另有说明，SKILLOPT运行四个epoch，rollout批大小为40，reflection小批大小为8，文本学习率为4，采用最小速率为2的余弦学习率衰减、留出验证门控、启用slow update并使用20个采样样例，以及启用优化器侧meta skill。优化器分别分析成功与失败，提出补丁式技能编辑，合并重复或矛盾的提议，在当前学习率上限下对编辑排序，并应用所选编辑形成候选技能。候选技能在选择集上评估，且仅当其提升当前选择分数时才被接受；最佳已接受技能导出为best_skill.md。优化过程中，学生模型、后端、harness和基准评测器保持不变。

                                                                                                              Ablation protocol. One-factor ablations vary a single scalar or component while holding the remaining optimizer configuration fixed. The train-size ablation fixes the train/selection/test split to 2:1:7 and varies how much of the training partition is exposed to the optimizer. The 100% row uses the full training partition under the same split, so it is directly comparable to the smaller-subset rows. Component ablations remove or alter one mechanism at a time, including the edit budget, rejected-edit buffer, and epoch-wise slow/meta update. 消融协议。单因素消融在保持其余优化器配置固定的情况下，改变单个标量或组件。训练规模消融固定训练/选择/测试划分为2:1:7，并改变向优化器开放多少训练部分。100%一行在相同划分下使用完整训练部分，因此可直接与更小子集的各行比较。组件消融一次移除或修改一个机制，包括编辑预算、被拒编辑缓冲区，以及按epoch进行的slow/meta更新。

                                                                                                              C.1 Optimization Procedure

                                                                                                              C.1 优化流程

                                                                                                              Algorithm 1 expands the procedure used in the experiments. The central state variables are the current skill s cur  ,the best validation-gated skill s best  ,a selection-score cache C ,a step buffer B containing rejected edits and observed failure patterns,and an optimizer-side meta skill m meta  used only to guide future edit generation. 算法 1 扩展了实验中使用的流程。核心状态变量包括当前技能 s cur 、最佳验证门控技能 s best 、一个选择分数缓存 C、用于存放被拒编辑与已观察到的失败模式的步骤缓冲区 B，以及仅用于指导未来编辑生成的优化器侧元技能 m meta 。

                                                                                                              C.2 Optimizer Prompt Contracts

                                                                                                              C.2 优化器提示合同

                                                                                                              The following blocks reproduce the operational prompt contracts used by the optimizer model, with terminology normalized to the paper's optimizer/training-model framing. The prompts require JSON outputs so that edits can be parsed, filtered, applied, and validated without manual intervention. 以下内容复现优化器模型所使用的操作性提示合同，并将术语统一为本文对优化器/训练模型的表述框架。该提示要求输出 JSON，以便在无需人工介入的情况下对编辑内容进行解析、筛选、应用与验证。

                                                                                                              C.2.1 Failure analysis: analyst_error.md

                                                                                                              C.2.1 故障分析：analyst_error.md

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              You are an expert failure-analysis agent for AI agent tasks. 你是一名擅长 AI 代理任务的故障分析专家。

                                                                                                                  You will be given MULTIPLE failed agent trajectories from a single minibatch     你将获得来自同一小批次的多个失败智能体轨迹

                                                                                                              and the current skill document. 以及当前技能文档。

                                                                                                              Your job is to identify the most important COMMON failure patterns across 你的任务是识别在所有（失败轨迹中）最重要的通用失败模式，共同的那些，

                                                                                                              the batch and propose a concise set of skill edits. 处理该批次，并提出一组简洁的技能修改建议。

                                                                                                                  ##Analysis Process     ####分析流程

                                                                                                                      1. Read ALL trajectories in the minibatch.         1. 阅读 minibatch 中的所有轨迹。

                                                                                                                  2. Identify the most prevalent, systematic failure patterns across them.     2. 找出其中最普遍、最系统的失效模式。

                                                                                                              1. For each pattern, classify its failure type.

                                                                                                              2. 对每个模式，归类其失败类型。

                                                                                                              1. Propose skill edits that address the COMMON patterns, not individual edge cases.

                                                                                                              2. 提出能应对常见模式的技能修改，而不是针对个别边缘情况。

                                                                                                              1. Edits must be generalizable; do not hardcode task-specific values.

                                                                                                              2. 修改内容必须具备通用性；不要硬编码与任务相关的特定数值。

                                                                                                              1. Only patch gaps in the skill; do not duplicate existing content.

                                                                                                              2. 只修补技能中的缺口；不要重复已有内容。

                                                                                                              You will be told the maximum number of edits (the budget L). Produce AT MOST L edits, 你将被告知最大编辑数（预算 L）。最多只生成 L 次编辑，

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Algorithm 1 SKILLOPT skill optimization 算法 1 SKILLOPT 技能优化

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Require: Frozen training model M ,optimizer model O ,harness h ,splits D train ,D sel ,D test  ,initial 要求：冻结训练模型 M ，优化器模型 O ，测试支架 h ，数据划分 D train ,D sel ,D test  ，初始

                                                                                                                          skill s0 ,epochs E ,edit-budget schedule Lt ,rollout batch size B ,accumulation factor A ,             技能 s0，轮数 E，编辑预算计划 Lt，rollout 批大小 B，累积因子 A，

                                                                                                                          reflection minibatch size Bm             反思 minibatch 大小 Bm

                                                                                                              Ensure: Best validation-gated skill s best  and held-out test score 确保：验证集门控下的最佳技能 s best  和留出测试分数

                                                                                                                  1: s cur ←s0,s best ←s0,C←∅,B←[],m meta ←∅

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                  2: score cur ←EVALUATE(M,h,s0,D sel ) ; score  best ←score cur      2：score cur ←EVALUATE(M,h,s0,D sel )；分数  best ←score cur 

                                                                                                                          C[HASH(s0)]←score cur 

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                          for e=1 to E do             对 e=1 到 E 执行

                                                                                                                                  Shuffle D train  into rollout batches; reset B←[]                     将 D train  打乱并分入 rollout 批；重置 B←[]

                                                                                                                                  for each optimization step in epoch e do                     在轮次 e 中的每个优化步骤执行

                                                                                                                                              Collect A rollout batches by executing h(M,x,s cur ) for sampled tasks x                                 通过对采样任务 x 执行 h(M,x,s cur ) 收集 A 个 rollout 批

                                                                                                                                              Split rollout evidence into failures and successes,then into minibatches of size Bm                                 将 rollout 证据分为失败和成功，再按大小 Bm 划分为 minibatch

                                                                                                                                          Ask O to analyze failure minibatches and produce failure patch proposals                             要求 O 分析失败 minibatch 并生成失败补丁提案

                                                                                                                                              Ask O to analyze success minibatches and produce success patch proposals                                 要求 O 分析成功 minibatch 并生成成功补丁提案

                                                                                                                                              Ask O to merge failure proposals,merge success proposals,and perform a final failure-                                 要求 O 合并失败提案、合并成功提案，并执行最终的失败-

                                                                                                                          prioritized merge             优先合并

                                                                                                                                          Ask O to rank merged edits and keep at most Lt edits                             要求 O 对合并后的编辑进行排序，并最多保留 Lt 个编辑

                                                                                                                                          Apply the selected edits to obtain a candidate skill s~                             应用选定的编辑以得到候选技能 s~

                                                                                                                                          if HASH(s~)∈C then                             如果 HASH(s~)∈C 则

                                                                                                                                                      score cand ←C[HASH(s~)]

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                          else                             else

                                                                                                                                                      score cand ←EVALUATE(M,h,s~,D sel )

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                      C[HAsH(s~)]←score cand 

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                          end if                             end if

                                                                                                                                          if score cand >score cur  then                             如果 score cand >score cur  则

                                                                                                                                                      s cur ←s~;score cur ←score cand 

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                      if score cand >score best  then                                         如果 score cand >score best  则

                                                                                                                                                              s best ←s~;score best ←score cand 

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                                      end if                                         end if

                                                                                                                                              else                                 else

                                                                                                                                                      Add rejected edits and observed failure patterns to B                                         将被拒绝的修改和观察到的失败模式加入到 B

                                                                                                                                              end if                                 end if

                                                                                                                                  end for                     end for

                                                                                                                                  if e≥2 and slow update is enabled then                     如果 e≥2 且启用慢速更新，则

                                                                                                                                              Compare the same sampled tasks under the previous and current epoch-end skills                                 将相同的采样任务在上一轮与当前轮末技能下进行对比

                                                                                                                                          Ask O for protected longitudinal guidance; validate the injected guidance through D sel                              请 O 提供受保护的纵向指导；并通过 D sel  验证注入的指导

                                                                                                                                  end if                     end if

                                                                                                                                  if e≥2 and optimizer memory is enabled then                     如果 e≥2 且启用优化器记忆，则

                                                                                                                                          Ask O to update m meta  for future edit generation and selection                             让 O 更新 m meta ，以用于未来的编辑生成与选择

                                                                                                                                  end if                     end if

                                                                                                                          end for             end for

                                                                                                                           score  test ←EVALUATE(M,h,s best ,D test )

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                          return s best , score  test              return s best , score  test 

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              focusing on the highest-impact patterns. You may produce fewer if warranted. 聚焦于影响最大的模式。如有需要，你可以产出更少。

                                                                                                              Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object (no markdown fences, no extra text): 仅以有效的 JSON 对象作答（不加 Markdown 代码块，不附加其他文本）：

                                                                                                              {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              "batch_size": , "batch_size": <已分析的轨迹数量>,

                                                                                                              "failure_summary": [ "failure_summary": [

                                                                                                              {"failure_type": "", "count": , "description": ""} {"failure_type": "<类型>", "count": , "description": "<一句话描述>"}

                                                                                                              ],

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                      "patch": {         "patch": {

                                                                                                                          "reasoning": "<why these edits address the batch's common failures>",             "reasoning": "<说明这些修改如何解决该批次的常见失败>",

                                                                                                                          "edits": [             "edits": [

                                                                                                                              {"op": "append", "content": ""},                 {"op": "append", "content": "<在技能末尾追加的 Markdown>"},

                                                                                                                                  {"op": "insert_after", "target": "<exact heading/text to insert after>",                     {"op": "insert_after", "target": "<在其后插入的精确标题/文本>",

                                                                                                                                  "content": ""},                     "content": ""},

                                                                                                                                  {"op": "replace", "target": "",                     {"op": "replace", "target": "<要替换的精确文本>",

                                                                                                                                  "content": ""},                     "content": "<替换内容>"},

                                                                                                                              {"op": "delete", "target": ""}                 {"op": "delete", "target": "<要删除的精确文本>"}

                                                                                                                          ]

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                  }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Only include edits that are needed. "edits" can be an empty list if no patch is warranted. 只包含需要的改动。“edits”可以是空列表，如果不需要任何补丁。

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              IMPORTANT: The skill document may contain a section between 重要：技能文档中可能包含介于

                                                                                                              and markers. 和 标记之间的部分。

                                                                                                              This is a PROTECTED section managed by a separate slow-update process. 这是一个受保护的部分，由单独的慢更新流程管理。

                                                                                                              Do NOT propose any edits that target, modify, or delete content within these markers. 请不要提出任何旨在、修改或删除这些标记内内容的改动。

                                                                                                              C.2.2 Success analysis: analyst_success.md

                                                                                                              C.2.2 成功分析：analyst_success.md

                                                                                                              You are an expert success-pattern analyst for AI agents. 你是面向 AI 智能体的专家成功模式分析员。

                                                                                                              You will be given MULTIPLE successful agent trajectories from a single minibatch and the current skill document. Your job is to identify generalizable behavior patterns that are COMMON across the batch and worth encoding in the skill. 将给你提供同一个小批次中的多个成功智能体轨迹，以及当前的技能文档。你的任务是找出在该批次中普遍存在、且值得被编码进该技能的可泛化行为模式。

                                                                                                              ##Rules

                                                                                                              规则

                                                                                                              • Only propose patches for patterns NOT already covered in the skill.

                                                                                                              • 只为尚未被技能覆盖的模式提出补丁。

                                                                                                              • Focus on patterns that appear across MULTIPLE trajectories in the batch.

                                                                                                              • 关注在该批次的多个轨迹中都出现的模式。

                                                                                                              • Be concise. Patterns must generalize beyond specific tasks.

                                                                                                              • 简洁。模式必须能超越特定任务进行泛化。

                                                                                                              • Prefer reinforcing existing sections over adding new top-level sections.

                                                                                                              • 优先强化现有章节，而不是新增新的顶层章节。

                                                                                                              You will be told the maximum number of edits (the budget L). Produce AT MOST L edits, focusing on the most broadly applicable patterns. You may produce fewer if warranted. 你将被告知允许的最大编辑次数（预算 L）。最多产出 L 次编辑，重点放在最广泛适用的模式上。若有必要，你也可以更少。

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object: 仅回复一个有效的 JSON 对象：

                                                                                                              {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                      "batch_size": ,         "batch_size": ,

                                                                                                                      "success_patterns": ["<pattern 1>", "<pattern 2>"],         "success_patterns": ["<pattern 1>", "<pattern 2>"],

                                                                                                                      "patch": {         "patch": {

                                                                                                                          "reasoning": "",             "reasoning": "<为什么这些模式值得被编码>",

                                                                                                                          "edits": [             "edits": [

                                                                                                                                  {"op": "append", "content": ""},                     {"op": "append", "content": ""},

                                                                                                                              {"op": "insert_after", "target": "<heading/text>", "content": ""},                 {"op": "insert_after", "target": "<heading/text>", "content": ""},

                                                                                                                              {"op": "replace", "target": "", "content": ""},                 {"op": "replace", "target": "", "content": ""},

                                                                                                                                  {"op": "delete", "target": "="}                     {"op": "delete", "target": "<需要移除的精确文本>="}

                                                                                                                          ]

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                  }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              "edits" may be empty if the skill already covers all observed patterns. 如果该技能文档已经覆盖了所有观察到的模式，则“edits”可能为空。

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              IMPORTANT: The skill document may contain a section between 重要：技能文档中可能包含一个位于

                                                                                                              and markers. 和 标记之间的部分。

                                                                                                              This is a PROTECTED section managed by a separate slow-update process. 这是由单独的慢更新流程管理的受保护部分。

                                                                                                              Do NOT propose any edits that target, modify, or delete content within these markers. 请不要提出任何会针对、修改或删除这些标记内内容的编辑。

                                                                                                              C.2.3 Failure merge: merge_failure.md

                                                                                                              C.2.3 故障合并：merge_failure.md

                                                                                                              You are a skill-edit coordinator. You receive multiple independently-proposed patches from FAILURE analysis of agent trajectories. Merge them into ONE coherent, non-redundant patch. 你是一名技能编辑协调员。你会收到多个彼此独立提出的补丁，这些补丁来自对代理轨迹的故障分析。请将它们合并为一个连贯、无冗余的补丁。

                                                                                                              Merge guidelines: 合并指南：

                                                                                                              1. Deduplicate: keep the best-worded version of similar edits.

                                                                                                              2. 去重：保留相似修改中措辞最佳的版本。

                                                                                                              1. Resolve conflicts: if patches contradict on the same point,

                                                                                                              2. 解决冲突：如果补丁在同一点上相互矛盾，

                                                                                                              choose the one with stronger justification or synthesize both. 选择论证更充分的那个，或将二者综合。

                                                                                                              1. Preserve unique insights: include all non-redundant corrective edits.

                                                                                                              2. 保留独特见解：纳入所有非冗余的修正性修改。

                                                                                                              1. Prevalent-pattern bias: edits appearing consistently across multiple patches

                                                                                                              2. 常见模式偏置：在多个补丁中一致出现的修改

                                                                                                              address systematic failures; preserve them with HIGH priority. 用于处理系统性失败；请以 HIGH 优先级保留它们。

                                                                                                              Edits from only one patch may be discarded if task-specific. 仅来自一个补丁的修改，如果是任务特定的，可以丢弃。

                                                                                                              1. Independence: no two edits in the merged patch may target the same text region.

                                                                                                              2. 独立性：合并后的补丁中，任意两项修改不得针对同一文本区域。

                                                                                                              1. Support count: for each merged edit, estimate how many source patches support it.

                                                                                                              2. 支持计数：对每项合并后的修改，估计有多少源补丁支持它。

                                                                                                              1. PROTECTED SECTION: The skill may contain a section between

                                                                                                              2. 受保护区域：技能可能包含一个位于

                                                                                                              and markers. 和 标记之间的部分。

                                                                                                              Do NOT merge or produce any edits that target content within these markers. 不要合并或生成任何针对这些标记内内容的修改。

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object: 仅以有效的 JSON 对象作答：

                                                                                                              {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                      "reasoning": "

                                                                                                              ",         "reasoning": "<关键整合决策摘要>",

                                                                                                                      "edits": [         "edits": [

                                                                                                                          {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                              "op": "append|insert_after|replace|delete",                 "op": "追加|在后插入|替换|删除",

                                                                                                                              "target": "<if insert_after or replace or delete>",                 "target": "<若为在后插入或替换或删除>",

                                                                                                                              "content": "",                 "content": "",

                                                                                                                              "support_count": ,                 "support_count": ,

                                                                                                                              "source_type": "failure"                 "source_type": "failure"

                                                                                                                          }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                  ]

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              C.2.4 Success merge: merge_success.md

                                                                                                              C.2.4 成功合并：merge_success.md

                                                                                                              You are a skill-edit coordinator. You receive multiple independently-proposed patches from SUCCESS analysis of agent trajectories. Merge them into ONE coherent patch that reinforces effective patterns. 你是一名技能编辑协调员。你会收到来自代理轨迹的 SUCCESS 分析所提出的多个彼此独立的补丁。请将它们合并为一个连贯的补丁，以强化有效模式。

                                                                                                              Merge guidelines: 合并指南：

                                                                                                              1. Deduplicate: keep only the most generalizable version of similar patterns.

                                                                                                              2. 去重：仅保留相似模式中最具泛化性的版本。

                                                                                                              1. Be conservative: success-driven patches reinforce existing behavior. Only include edits for patterns NOT already in the skill.

                                                                                                              2. 保持保守：成功驱动的补丁是对现有行为的强化。只包含那些针对技能中尚未存在模式的编辑。

                                                                                                              1. Prevalent-pattern bias: patterns seen across many successful trajectories are most worth encoding.

                                                                                                              2. 常见模式偏置：在许多成功轨迹中反复出现的模式最值得编码。

                                                                                                              1. Support count: estimate how many source patches support each merged edit.

                                                                                                              2. 支持数量：估计有多少源补丁支持每一项合并后的编辑。

                                                                                                              1. PROTECTED SECTION: The skill may contain a section between

                                                                                                              2. 受保护区段：该技能可能包含一个位于

                                                                                                              and markers. 和标记之间的区段。

                                                                                                              Do NOT merge or produce any edits that target content within these markers. 不要合并或生成任何针对这些标记内内容的编辑。

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object: 仅用有效的 JSON 对象回复：

                                                                                                              {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                      "reasoning": "

                                                                                                              ",         "reasoning": "",

                                                                                                                      "edits": [         "edits": [

                                                                                                                          {

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                                  "op": "append | insert_after | replace | delete",                     "op": "append | insert_after | replace | delete",

                                                                                                                                  "target": "",                     "target": "",

                                                                                                                                  "content": "",                     "content": "",

                                                                                                                                  "support_count": ,                     "support_count": <整数>,

                                                                                                                                  "source_type": "success"                     "source_type": "success"

                                                                                                                          }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                                      ]

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              }

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                               

                                                                                                              C.2.5 Final merge: merge_final.md

                                                                                                              C.2.5 最终合并：merge_final.md

                                                                                                              You are a skill-edit coordinator performing the FINAL merge. You receive two 你是技能编辑协调员，执行最终合并。你将接收两个

                                                                                                              pre-merged patch groups: 预合并的补丁组：

                                                                                                              1. Failure-driven patches (corrective, high priority)

                                                                                                              2. 基于失败的补丁（纠错，高优先级）

                                                                                                              1. Success-driven patches (reinforcement, lower priority)

                                                                                                              2. 基于成功的补丁（强化，低优先级）

                                                                                                              Merge guidelines: 合并准则：

                                                                                                              1. FAILURE PATCHES TAKE PRIORITY: the primary goal of skill reflection is to

                                                                                                              2. 失败补丁优先：技能反思的首要目标是

                                                                                                              fix failures. Failure-driven edits should be preserved unless they directly 修复失败。除非它们与有充分依据的成功模式直接

                                                                                                              conflict with a well-supported success pattern. 冲突，否则应保留基于失败的修改。

                                                                                                              1. Deduplicate: if a failure edit and success edit cover the same point,

                                                                                                              2. 去重：如果失败修改和成功修改覆盖同一要点，

                                                                                                              keep the failure version. 保留失败版本。

                                                                                                              1. Preserve success insights: include success edits that cover patterns

                                                                                                              2. 保留成功洞见：纳入那些

                                                                                                              NOT addressed by failure edits. 未被失败修改覆盖的模式的成功修改。

                                                                                                              1. Higher-level merges represent broader consensus: edits that survived

                                                                                                              2. 高层级合并代表更广泛的一致性：在

                                                                                                              previous merge rounds should be given priority. 先前合并轮次中存留下来的修改应优先处理。

                                                                                                              1. Carry forward support_count and source_type for each edit.

                                                                                                              2. 继承每条修改的 support_count 和 source_type。

                                                                                                              1. PROTECTED SECTION: The skill may contain a section between

                                                                                                              2. 受保护部分：该技能可能包含一个部分，其位于

                                                                                                              复制为：—

                                                                                                              常用操作

                                                                                                              # 图标：复制段落链接 / 片段

                                                                                                              收起/展开大纲：O；回到顶部：T

                                                                                                              显示/隐藏注释：C

                                                                                                              链接样式

                                                                                                              • 原文：#段落（Alt+1）
                                                                                                              • %编码：#%E6%AE%B5%E8%90%BD（Alt+2）
                                                                                                              • 富文本片段（HTML 片段）（Alt+3）
                                                                                                              • 循环切换：U

                                                                                                              复制格式（仅“原文 / %编码”可用）

                                                                                                              • 设为 URL：Alt+U
                                                                                                              • 设为 Markdown：Alt+M
                                                                                                              • 二者切换：M

                                                                                                              大纲与导航

                                                                                                              • 展开全部：E；收起全部：R
                                                                                                              • 滚动时自动高亮并展开对应大纲分支
